notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Matt Festa on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Ceddanne Rafaela reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Brayan Rocchio.

notableEvents.label: Masataka Yoshida pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Masataka Yoshida flies out to left fielder Stuart Fairchild.

notableEvents.label: Willson Contreras plunked
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras hit by pitch. Wilyer Abreu to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Marcelo Mayer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Marcelo Mayer reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by pitcher Will Dion. Wilyer Abreu to 3rd. Willson Contreras to 2nd. Wilyer Abreu advances to 3rd, on a missed catch error by third baseman José Ramírez.

notableEvents.label: Masataka Yoshida pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Masataka Yoshida walks. Wilyer Abreu scores. Willson Contreras to 3rd. Marcelo Mayer to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Connor Wong singles on a line drive to left fielder Stuart Fairchild. Willson Contreras scores. Marcelo Mayer scores. Masataka Yoshida to 3rd. Connor Wong to 2nd. Throwing error by left fielder Stuart Fairchild.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Brayan Rocchio.
